caveats.sparse_keyframes: Raw=5 KFs, Masked=9 KFs. Only KeyFrameTrajectory.txt (no dense CameraTrajectory.txt). APE/RPE on 5-9 pose pairs.
caveats.no_dense_per_frame_poses: ORB-SLAM3 tracking covered ~1.2s of 7s sequence. GT has 64 poses over ~7s.
caveats.monocular_scale_ambiguity: ORB-SLAM3 mono has inherent scale ambiguity. SE(3) Umeyama alignment corrects rotation/translation only.
caveats.short_window: 64-frame window may be insufficient for robust mono initialization.

raw.label: Raw (unmasked)
raw.align_type: SE(3) Umeyama alignment, no scale correction

masked.label: Masked
masked.align_type: SE(3) Umeyama alignment, no scale correction

verdict.defensibility: APE/RPE are mathematically valid (matched timestamps, SE(3) alignment). N=5-9 sparse keyframe pairs: statistically underpowered for trajectory-level comparison. No improvement claim is supported.
verdict.raw_vs_masked: Raw APE RMSE=0.041 m vs Masked APE RMSE=0.043 m. Difference within sparse-sampling uncertainty. No direction claim supported.
verdict.note: Masked KF count (9) > raw KF count (5) is a runtime/tracking observation only — does not constitute odometry improvement evidence.
